allOf.description: The connection string specified for the connection alias. The connection string must be in the form of a fully qualified domain name (FQDN), such as www.example.com.
The identifier of the connection alias.
The current state of the connection alias.
The identifier of the Amazon Web Services account that owns the connection alias.
The association status of the connection alias.

description: Describes a connection alias. Connection aliases are used for cross-Region redirection. For more information, see Cross-Region Redirection for Amazon WorkSpaces.
title: ConnectionAlias
